text:
Created attachment 231473
v1

Moin moin

desktop@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update print/harfbuzz* to 3.3.0

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-print-harfbuzz-update-to-3.3.0.patch


mfg Tobias
